programme.desc: Ambitious young reporter Pollack (Justin Timberlake) suspects insidious corruption in his town's elite police unit, known as F.R.A.T., and finds a friendly source in Deed (LL Cool J), a dissatisfied member of the squad. With Deed's information and the backing of his publisher, Ashford (Morgan Freeman), and a crusading lawyer, Wallace (Kevin Spacey), Pollack infiltrates the secretive police cabal. He finds himself in over his head, however, when he discovers the true extent of the criminality.

programme.title: The Moon is in Aquarius
programme.desc: On a starry night lit by an Aquarius full moon, Devante and Liz collide at a house party in San Francisco. The spark is instant-and impossible to ignore. Ditching the crowd, they embark on a spontaneous journey through the city's winding streets, iconic views, and hidden gems. With every laugh and shared secret, their bond deepens. But is this love story bound by time-do they only have until dawn?

programme.title: I'm In Love With A Church Girl
programme.desc: A reformed drug trafficker finds unexpected love with a woman guided by strong faith, testing his resolve to leave his criminal past behind.

programme.title: The Challenger
programme.desc: The Challenger follows the life struggles of a young, Bronx auto mechanic, Jaden Miller. When Jaden and his mother are evicted from their home, he soon finds that boxing may be the key to stop them from living on the streets and the ticket to a better life. With legendary trainer, Duane Taylor, Miller becomes a local hero and captures the attention of a cable network that decides to create a reality show around his goal to fight to the Light-Heavyweight Title.

programme.title: Blessed & Cursed
programme.desc: Pain, Deceit and Triumph are just some of the plots twists that viewers will experience in this highly anticipated movie! A modern retelling of the dramatic Biblical account of Saul and David, Blessed & Cursed stars Gospel sensation Deitrick Haddon in his first theatrical debut as Dwight Hawkins an incredibly gifted young man who is in search of his purpose amid setbacks and unexpected surprises!

programme.title: The Wait Game
programme.desc: Yolanda Hills, a woman deeply in love with her longtime partner Jonas Jones, has been patiently awaiting their wedding day. Their idyllic relationship takes a terrifying turn when a home intruder invades their peaceful sanctuary. Held captive in her own home, Yolanda is confronted with a shocking revelation that will forever alter the course of their lives.

programme.title: The Walk of Rufus
programme.desc: Eldest son, Rufus, takes over the family empire of running the streets of Chicago, but change comes at a cost.

programme.title: The Queens Court

programme.title: Three Secrets
programme.desc: Struck with the grief after losing her child, Naomi is stuck in a depression while her husband begins to stray from their marriage. As events unfold She finds herself in an unexpected entanglement built on lies.

programme.title: Moon Crash

programme.title: Broadcast Signal Intrusion (Edited Version)
programme.desc: For three years, James (Harry Shum Jr.) has been haunted by his wifes sudden and inexplicable disappearance. His best distraction is workspecifically, archiving old videos. While watching decade-aged TV news footage one night, he sees a video interference thats deeply disturbing. And its not the only interference hell see. As his obsession over these strange clips increases, and he submerges himself into their mysteries, James discovers troubling connections to his missing wife. Which will these broadcast intrusions bring him, though: long-desired answers or a never-ending nightmare?

programme.title: When A Stranger Calls (Edited Version)
programme.desc: A psychopathic killer terrorizes a babysitter, then returns seven years later to menace her again.

programme.title: Ice Cream Man (Edited Version)
programme.desc: Poor Gregory. After being released from the Wishing Well Sanatorium, all he wants to do is make the children happy. So Gregory reopens the old ice cream factory, and all the unappreciative brats are reprocessed into the flavor of the day.

programme.title: Victor Crowley (Edited Version)
programme.desc: In 2007, over forty people were brutally torn to pieces in Louisianas Honey Island Swamp. Over the past decade, lone survivor Andrews (Parry Shen) claims that local legend Victor Crowley (Kane Hodder, Friday the 13th series) was responsible for the horrific massacre have been met with great controversy. But when a twist of fate puts him back at the scene of the tragedy, Crowley is mistakenly resurrected and Andrew must face the bloodthirsty ghost from his past. Featuring Laura Ortiz (The Hills Have Eyes), Dave Sheridan (Scary Movie), and Brian Quinn (truTVs Impractical Jokers), writer/director Adam Greens triumphant return to the directors chair proudly assures an all-new, horrifying journey into the haunted, blood-drenched bayou.

programme.title: Onyx the Fortuitous and the Talisman of Souls
programme.desc: Amateur occultist Marcus J. Trillbury, aka Onyx the Fortuitous, is struggling at home and work, but his dreams seem to be answered when he lands a coveted invitation to the mansion of his idol Bartok the Great for a ritual to raise the spirit of an ancient demon. As Onyx and a fellow group of devotees join Bartok to prepare for the ceremony, the getaway of his dreams soon takes a nightmarish turn and Onyx must decide what hes willing to truly sacrifice in order to meet his destiny.

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: Harry stumbles upon an old scarecrow and brings it to life. Then, Lydia kills her lover and needs to hide the evidence, but after an earthquake she gets trapped inside an elevator with the body.

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: A killer gets stranded in a funeral home with a mortician and his monkey paw. Then, former Mayor Barkley is in prison, and with his most loyal supporters locked up too, his odds don't look good.

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan discovers a cure to weight loss in a rare fat-sucking leech. Then, Rose believes she found Champ, the legendary monster of Lake Champlain, but the real monster may still be out there.

programme.title: Creepshow

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: A marketing ploy at a haunted Bed and Breakfast becomes way too realistic. Then, an exterminator gets more than he bargained for when he takes on a big job.

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: A drain clog turns out to be more than just a little matted hair and soap scum. Then, scientists fight to contain the creature they've been studying - but is the true threat one of them?

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: Simon has invented an incredible virtual reality experience that allows him to join in on his favorite films ... but what happens when the virtual reality becomes Simon's actual reality?

programme.desc: "The Garden Party" - Mrs. Drysdale has a garden party and 'invites' the Clampetts by mistake. They end up back by their 'cement pond' to handle the 'overflow' from Mrs. Drysdale's party. A gun shot by Granny starts the real party.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Turkey Day" - Elly bonds with the Thanksgiving turkey so the family can't bring themselves to kill it; Mrs Drysdale hires some Indians to take a Thanksgiving picture, which puts Granny on the warpath.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts Go Hollywood" - When Jake Clampett tells Jed he's his cousin, he's welcomed into the home and soon has everyone but Jed thinking about and dressing for a role in their next movie.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts Are Overdrawn" - The Clampetts receive an overdraft from the bank intended for the deadbeat actor J.D. 'Jake' Clampett, while he gets their statement and starts to spend their money.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Chickadee Returns" - Jethro thinks he's in love with Chickadee Laverne, a stripper he met at the bank. She and the Clampetts have meet and have different ideas about what an "engagement" is, while Miss Hathaway tries to avert this disaster.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jethro's First Love" - Jethro decides that he wants to go a-courtin', so after Uncle Jed gives him a little education, he finds himself a woman--who happens to be a stripper. As usual, neither she or the Clampetts actually understand what the other is really saying.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampette Look" - Cynthia Fenwick makes her filthy rich mother dress in the "Clampett Look" when they visit the Clampetts, since she thinks Elly is a fashion maven. That only reinforces the Clampett's belief that the Fenwicks are poor.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Elly Starts to School" - Mrs. Drysdale recommends Elly for a high-brow finishing school in hopes that humiliating her will drive the Clampetts away; but instead Miss Hathaway convinces the girls at the school that Elly is a fashion trend-setter. Elly invites the filthy rich Fenwicks over, thinking they're destitute.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Granny's Garden" - Grannie has everyone up at the crack of down to plow the front yard for her garden, while Mr. Drysdale, Miss Hathaway, and a stubborn mule try to stop her.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Hair-Raising Holiday" - After Granny cuts off the top of Drysdale and Clyburn's (his doctor) hair for some homegrown remedy, Clyburn tries to keep her from ever doctoring again. Meanwhile, the Clampetts are looking forward to the Possum Day parade, which of course isn't celebrated in Beverly Hills, so Drysdale has to figure out how to have one to keep them happy.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Gets the Misery" - Jed cheers up Granny by pretending to be sick so she can doctor him. Soon Drysdale and his doctor, Clyburn, are subject to her methods as well.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro brings home a friend, Armstrong Dueser McHugh III, who is coddled by a chauffeur who treats him as frail. The Clampetts know better, and show him a good time, friendship and family.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When Miss Hathaway gets sick and Mr. Drysdale has to speak at a conference, Jed helps out by running the bank and having Elly be his secretary, while Jethro finds a speech that Drysdale accidentally uses instead of his own. All the while a new teller sucks-up to the men and flirts with the women.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.desc: The town of North Fork becomes a haven for outlaws when suave Ben Judson smooth-talks his way into the marshal's job.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas develops temporary amnesia from a head injury while visiting a strange town and mistakenly assumes the identity of a wanted criminal.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.desc: After a raid by Comanches, six remaining cavalrymen join a stagecoach and lead it to safety.

programme.title: Gunman's Walk
programme.desc: A powerful rancher always protects his wild adult son with hush money, until the son's crimes cross the line.

programme.title: Ambush At Tomahawk Gap
programme.desc: Hodiak, Brian, Derek and Teal have just been released from prison. They return to Tomahawk Gap, now a ghost town, to retrieve the money that they stole and was buried by a partner somewhere in the town. While hunting, the Indians attack, and a life and death battle ensues.

programme.title: The New Daughters Of Joshua Cabe
programme.desc: Three young women who posed as the daughters of an elderly homesteader find out that he has been falsely accused of murder, convicted and sentenced to hang. They hatch a plot to smuggle him out of prison.

programme.title: Wyoming Renegades
programme.desc: Brady Sutton, former member of the Butch Cassidy gang, returns from years in prison and tries to go straight.

programme.title: Law of the Pampas
programme.desc: Murder below the Equator...and Hopalong Cassidy races to action in the heart of the wild Pampas country !Hoppy (William Boyd) and his pal Lucky (Russell Hayden) head to South America to look after a herd of cattle sold by Cassidy's boss to an Argentine rancher. Unfortunately, the scoundrel Ralph Merritt (Sidney Blackmer) wants the cattle, and he's not above hiring some dangerous characters to do his dirty work. It's a test of blazing guns...under a blazing sun! Can the boys of Bar 20 lay down the law in a lawless place like the Pampas? Can Hoppy and his gang succeed in what is truly a last frontier? Watch and see!

programme.title: Mason of the Mounted
programme.desc: Canadian Mountie Mason is sent south of the border to look for a horse thief with only a watch chain for evidence. He befriends young Andy and when Calhoun hits Andy, Mason and Calhoun fight. In the scuffle Calhoun's watch with the missing chain is dislodged. Mason then sets out to bring in Calhoun and his gang.

programme.title: Public Cowboy No. 1
programme.desc: Gene Autry and Smiley Burnette are back, and this time theyre dealing with some very modern thinking rustlers. These new criminals have taken up the latest technologies to outsmart the authorities, including shortwave radios and airplanes! Can Gene and Smiley get em? You bet! Songs include The West Aint What It Used To Be, I Got the HeebieJeebie Blues, and The Defective Detective from Brooklyn. Gene also gets romantic when he sings, I Picked up the Trail when I Found You...

programme.title: Song of Arizona
programme.desc: This Roy Rogers adventure finds Gabby Whitaker (Gabby Hayes) running a ranch for wayward boys. One of the boys uses stolen money to help Gabby pay off his debts, but things unravel when the boys father, a notorious outlaw named King Blaine, is murdered; the rest of the Blaine gang show up at Gabbys looking for the loot! Director Frank McDonald works with a fine cast, including Dale Evans, Lyle Talbot, and of course, Roys beloved horse Trigger.

programme.title: My Pal Trigger
programme.desc: Roy Rogers goes to jail after hes wrongly accused of killing Gabby Hayes horse in this action packed yarn from Republic Pictures. All of the old jokes about cowboys kissing their horse may have started with this very movie, as it focuses on Roys loving relationship with Trigger, the greatest horse in all of Hollywood. The film also features Roys beloved Dale Evans, plus, adding some country swing to the musical numbers is Roys favorite backing band, the Sons of the Pioneers! Songs include Ole Faithful, Long, Long Ago and Livin Western Style.

programme.title: Robin Hood of the Pecos
programme.desc: Roy Rogers finds himself elected sheriff in a wild Texas town after the Civil War. But can Roy handle a place under martial law? And can he save Gabby Hayes from being executed? And how many songs will he get to sing? Clear the burrs from your saddle and get ready for a good one, also starring Marjorie Reynolds, plus Sally Payne as Belle Starr, Queen of the Oklahoma Outlaws!

programme.title: New Mexico
programme.desc: What happens when Abraham Lincoln himself comes to New Mexico to discuss a treaty with Native American chief Acoma (Ted de Corsia)? Can the hotbed of emotions be quieted by cavalry Captain Hunt (Lew Ayres)? Or will the Captains superiors insist on provoking with the native tribe? Find out what happens in this fictional tale packed with action from 1951!

programme.title: The Ballad Of Lefty Brown

programme.title: Recipe Lab with Chris Ying

programme.title: Recipe Lab with Chris Ying
programme.desc: "One Pot 'Chicken Korma'" - Twitter is very upset about this Tasty UK recipe for one-pot chicken korma. Chris is 100 percent sure that 1 this is an intentional troll recipe; and 2 hes going to get canceled for testing it.

programme.title: Recipe Lab with Chris Ying
programme.desc: "Crispy Pork Belly Revisited" - The journey to Cantonese-style roasted pork belly continues. This time Chris is trying a longer drying time in the fridge to see if that gets him closer to crisp skin. We’ll see…

programme.title: Recipe Club
programme.desc: "Cocktail Weenies in Grape Jelly & BBQ Sauce" - Dave Chang, Chris Ying, and John deBary tackle a recipe straight out of the 1970s: Lit’l Smokies cocktail weenies simmered in barbecue sauce and grape jelly. We made the original PLUS three variations, including an ultra-luxe version, a keto version, and a one-pot version.

programme.title: Recipe Club
programme.desc: "Spaghetti with Sardines and Cherry Tomatoes" - Rachel Khong joins David Chang and Chris Ying for this episode focused on using tinned fish as the key ingredient. The recipe: Bill Pearis’s Spaghetti with Sardines and Cherry Tomatoes. Dave makes a keto-friendly version. Rachel tries to make it using ingredients from the pantry. Chris makes his vegan.

programme.title: Recipe Club
programme.desc: "Pork Belly Jae-Yuk Orzo" - Priya Krishna joins David Chang and Chris Ying to stir up some Korean-Italian magic with Ruth Lee’s Jaeyuk Pork Belly Orzo. Using the key ingredient of canned tomatoes, this is a suprisingly simple, hacky recipe that is delicious and comforting. Priya makes a keto-friendly version. Dave makes his using only shelf-stable ingredients. Chris makes it in under 20 minutes.

programme.title: Recipe Club
programme.desc: "Mom's Crab Cakes" - Dave and Chris are joined by Rachel Khong to riff on the Dunn family’s tattoo-worthy crab cake recipe.

programme.title: Recipe Club
programme.desc: "Authentic Carne Asada Clásica by Bricia Lopez" - Join renowned chef Bricia Lopez in the kitchen as she shows you how to make the ultimate Carne Asada Clásica! In this step-by-step cooking tutorial, Bricia, known for her expertise in traditional Mexican cuisine, guides you through the process of creating the perfect, mouth-watering carne asada.

programme.title: Recipe Club
programme.desc: Recipe Club: Gobhi Keema Matar - David Chang and Chris Ying are joined by Priya Krishna in the studio for this special episode of Recipe Club, with cauliflower as the theme ingredient. They try out a recipe for gobhi keema matar, a flavorful curry made with minced cauliflower and peas in a cilantro and onion gravy. Dave attempts to make it in a slow cooker (his method is strongly not recommended to try at home!); Priya makes a “doomsday” version using only shelf-stable ingredients; Chris makes a Tex-Mex version (ever heard of “pea-camole”?).

programme.title: Recipe Club
programme.desc: "Chris Ying Makes Slow Cooker Carne Asada" - Taking inspiration from Bricia Lopez's method for making her LA-style carne asada, Chris tries to make it in a slow cooker instead of on a grill. He uses a chuck roast and lets it cook low and slow in the marinade, coming away with something similar to Carne en su Jugo ("meat in its own juices"), but nonetheless delicious and very easy!

programme.title: Recipe Club
programme.desc: "Pork Chili" - Dave and Chris are joined by special guest Dave Arnold to run up the score on his very own Game-Day Pork Chili recipe! This is one of those recipes that you can make a huge batch of and be everyone’s favorite tailgate buddy. But, as usual, the Recipe Club isn’t going to take the easy way out. Dave does a Caribbean-inspired spin based on the true story of Jamaican oxtail, Chris tried an Italian-style fusion, and the guys—kind as ever—insisted that Dave Arnold turn this pork chili dish into a cocktail.

programme.title: Tasting History with Max Miller
programme.desc: Max explores medieval English taverns, inns, and alehouses, each serving different roles and social classes. Taverns sold wine, inns provided lodging, and alehouses were private homes selling ale. The episode covers wine quality control, bread and ale laws, and their reputations for gambling and excess. He recreates bokenade, a beef pottage with saffron, cloves, and verjuice.

programme.title: Tasting History with Max Miller
programme.desc: Max explores the Old West saloon as a social hub for food and drink. He covers its evolving design, popular beverages like whiskey, beer, champagne, and cocktails, gambling games such as poker, and the famous “free lunch” tradition. The episode highlights regional foods, oysters’ popularity, and recreates an 1886 pork and beans recipe from *Cooking for Profit*.

programme.title: Tasting History with Max Miller
programme.desc: Max explores WWII home front rationing in the U.S., from 1942 sugar limits to the red and blue point system for meat, dairy, and canned goods. He covers price controls, Victory Gardens, labor shortages, internment camps, and black-market “meatleggers.” He also recreates Betty Crocker’s “emergency steak,” a budget-friendly mix of ground beef, cereal, and milk.

programme.title: Tasting History with Max Miller
programme.desc: Max explores Titanic’s luxurious first class, from modest suites to lavish parlor suites with private promenades. He covers dining in the saloon and Ritz, daily meals, amenities like the gym and Turkish bath, and the 10+ course final dinner. Using survivor accounts, he recreates the famous peaches in Chartreuse jelly dessert from April 14, 1912.

programme.title: Tasting History with Max Miller
programme.desc: Max explores Titanic’s first class breakfast from April 11, 1912, featuring over a dozen dishes by Escoffier. He recreates baked apples, smoked salmon coronets, shirred eggs, and buckwheat cakes with blackcurrant conserve. The episode highlights dining venues, passenger pets, and the tragic story of honeymooners Victor and Maria Josefa Peñasco.

programme.title: Tasting History with Max Miller
programme.desc: Max explores the 4–6 month, 2,200-mile Oregon Trail journey (1846–1869), covering provisions like flour, bacon, and hardtack, cooking over buffalo chips, and staple meals like Johnny cakes. He discusses hunting, trading with Native Americans, celebrations, and hardships, including spoiled food, salt-rising bread, pies, and pioneers leaving possessions at Fort Laramie.

programme.title: Tasting History with Max Miller
programme.desc: Max recreates Ötzi the Iceman’s last meal (c. 3,359–3,105 BC), discovered in 1991. He covers Ötzi’s clothing, tools, health (tattoos, heart disease, parasites), and likely murder by arrow. Using stomach contents—smoked ibex, charred red deer, and einkorn pancake with fiddle ferns—Max cooks over an open fire to mimic Neolithic methods.

programme.title: Tasting History with Max Miller
programme.desc: Max traces airline food from 1919’s first commercial meal to aviation’s Golden Age (1950s–70s). He covers flight kitchens, cold-to-hot meal evolution, themed flights, flight attendant hiring, the 1958 Great Sandwich War, and 1978 deregulation. Max recreates a 1954 United Airlines meal of pot roast, vegetables, Delmonico potatoes, and marshmallow-apple salad.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Mar is tasked with carving out two new basement rooms from storage space: a studio and laundry room. The homeowners expect to be wowed by these 'creative' and 'clean' space makeovers, but with pipes and beams in the way and unexpected challenges, this project might just push Mar over the edge.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Any home makeover has its ups and downs, but it's literally true with this staircase and foyer. Mar renovates the home's core areas, illustrating how to reclaim needed space, while creating impactful design that doesn't compete with adjacent rooms. An unexpected find-a gorgeous chandelier from a famous NY building-will be the perfect finishing touch if it makes it through the tricky installation.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: The Big Finale features Mar designing two useful, decorative his-and-hers structures to grace the pool area. Sheds become elevated design when form follows function--and include Mar's six core principles of Casual Luxury. Mar and his pup Violet find time for a much-needed minibreak to pet-friendly locations and shopping in NYC right before the final makeover reveal delights with surprise guests.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Master bedrooms and baths are things that dreams are made of until some nightmare hiccups happen. Turns out that visiting Broadway show sets provides unexpected inspiration. programme.desc: The holidays are in full swing on Mar's. Join America's Top Lifestyle Expert Mar Jennings and his home makeover team as they enjoy Westport CT during the holidays with activities like caroling, sleigh rides, shopping and more.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: The transformation of a Westport CT mid-century bungalow picks up steam and the change is amazing. America's Top Lifestyle Expert Mar Jennings and his team love seeing their plans come to life. programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Think small! Small spaces are the new big trend in design. Mar is the master of small space transformation - and shows how it can be applied by staging 2 very different spaces: a small cape style home and a newly constructed apartment complex, both in downtown Westport, CT. You won’t believe how spacious these small footprint Casual Luxury reveals are.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: The transformation of a Westport CT street comes to a halt when Mar's own home suffers some unexpected damage. But that means an all-new kitchen. Team Mar may not be able to cope with this one, especially when the project seems to keep on growing.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: After a water leak forced Mar to make an emergency renovation to his own kitchen, work began with a design palette all inspired by a fish. Now Mar is ready to finish it up, but takes a break to throw out the first pitch at a game. Hopefully his aim will be true.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: All the worlds a stage when you're an amazing home stager. Watch a gorgeous new construction get staged to sell as only Mar can do it. This home references the past, and time travel is definitely a theme.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Our blooper show returns. We work hard to make this show just for you. But it doesn't always go smoothly, and this is your chance to see for yourself. All the crazy antics we didn't show from Season 2.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: You won't believe what I and my team do to this space in the biggest kitchen renovation this season. My neighbor Barbara is in for the kitchen of her dreams. Watch it all unfold.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Our season 2 finale. Mar and his team celebrate their final reveal and all of season 2. The momentum of the entire show season come together for the perfect send-off. Plus we get to meet Daisy, the newest resident of the makeover street.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Paul gets a new client call from people who have just downsized. Their new place is great—except for odd layouts and wasted space. They want Mar's magic touch while they are traveling. Not a small project: a total kitchen and primary bedroom & bath demo and reno in less than a month. Can Mar create the perfect space without the client present? Will they love Mar's Casual Luxury designs?

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Mar continues his rush reno while clients are away. Primary bedroom and bathroom, plus a kitchen—without the client present. A lot is going right—but will it be what they really expect? Despite Mar's award-winning design eye, when the clients return, how highly will they rate these Casual Luxury results?

programme.title: Under the Pole
programme.desc: Dive into the frigid waters of the Arctic Ocean to discover an awe-inspiring universe under the ice. Spend two months trekking over ice floes by foot, and plunge beneath the icy waters of the North Pole. This unique documentary is precise testimony of what is at risk to our world's ice caps.

programme.title: Green Paradise
programme.desc: With its wide-open spaces and pristine coastline, the province of KwaZulu-Natal has become one of South Africa's ecotourism havens. Away from the carefree atmosphere of its beaches, become a privileged witness to KwaZulu-Natal's well-preserved flora, fauna, and wildlife, possibly "The Big Five?"

programme.title: Green Paradise
programme.desc: Connecting the continents of Asia and Africa, the mountainous country of Oman is beset by sand and water. Overlooking an azure ocean, its emerald rivers add color to the soft red and golden sands. Boasting one of the most diverse natural environments on the Arabian Peninsula, Oman is captured here.

programme.title: National Parks Revealed
programme.desc: Bask in luxurious getaways and rustic retreats that are almost as celebrated as the wondrous landscapes that surround them. The Old Faithful Inn in Yellowstone National Park, and the natural springs at the Furnace Creek Inn in Death Valley National Park are just two of the treasures you will visit.

programme.title: Wild Life
programme.desc: Life in the Iberian Peninsula is lush and varied. Learn how two opposing worlds were joined in a single territory that remained isolated by the Pyrenees Mountains. The results are a collection of forgotten places, exciting animals, and unique splendors.

programme.title: Inside America's National Parks
programme.desc: Grand Teton National Park is a geological wonder, a hiker's paradise, and an irresistible lure for thrill seekers and wildlife enthusiasts. Climb a sheer cliff wall, raft a raging river, visit an avalanche lab, join a search and rescue team, work a dude ranch, and rough it at posh retreats.

programme.title: Under the Pole
programme.desc: Dive into the polar abyss of Greenland's fjords, testing the limits of man's ability to survive beneath Arctic waters. This expedition explores of 800 miles of Greenland's coasts, 450 Arctic dives, and researching over 1,000 scientific hypotheses with guidance by the local Inuit population.

programme.title: Secrets of the National Parks
programme.desc: Discover the secrets of the Southwest along famous Route 66 and the Grand Circle, an area concentrated with national parks. Discover how Monument Valley in Utah and Gallup in New Mexico became cinematic locations, jet-ski in Lake Powell, and explore the spirit of the Navajo in Canyon de Chelly.

programme.title: Secrets of the National Parks
programme.desc: Hawaii Volcanoes and Haleakala National Parks are two of the most extraordinary places on Earth. Here you can witness molten lava bubbling from the earth, catch a spectacular sunrise above the cloud-line, or take a dip into pools of paradise.

programme.title: Wild Life
programme.desc: Central America is a strip of land connecting two large land masses, a small region with an extraordinary natural richness. The Iberian Peninsula is the most bio-diverse region in Europe, acting as an umbilical cord between Africa and Europe. Both places are defined as "biological bridges."

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown
programme.desc: Weather has always been here, from long before arrived, and it will stick around long after we are gone. This unstoppable force has both enhanced and ruined people's days since the dawn of time...but it also creates some incredible situations. Lucky for you, we've captured some of the best for you to see. Strap in and prepare yourself, because it's time once again for Extreme Weather Countdown.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown
programme.desc: Here at Extreme Weather Countdown, no natural phenomenon is too crazy, and we've returned with an episode chock-full of footage from the eye of the storm. Settle in, because there are rough seas ahead.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown

programme.title: Captured: Extreme Weather
programme.desc: El Niño is a temperature anomaly in the Pacific Ocean that affects weather patterns around the globe. In this episode we show some of the costly and deadly weather that can result when a Super El Niño occurs.

programme.title: Captured: Extreme Weather

programme.title: Captured: Extreme Weather
programme.desc: A catastrophic earthquake, a mesmerizing avalanche, a destructive tornado, and an unintentional smashup derby on icy highways; our experts weigh in on these viral videos as people get caught off guard by the sudden and powerful forces of nature.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown
programme.desc: We always take weather for granted, but when Mother Nature turns up the heat, she forces us to pay attention.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown

programme.title: Mr. Pig & Mr. Mouse Have A Mess On Their Hands - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Mr. Mouse and Mr. Pig love making food and having their friends over to eat it. But afterwards, their house is a complete mess! It's so gross, they don't even want to drive their van home to clean up. How can Mr. Mouse and Mr. Pig share their love of food with their friends without cluttering their home? Mr. Monkey has a tasty idea! What is it? Watch and find out!

programme.title: The Pinocchio - Sing Along With Tobee - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Caitie made a fluffy bird marionette named Fifi! Fifi is full of jokes and Tobee can't stop laughing! Caitie knows another marionette who is just as silly as Fifi. It's Pinocchio! There's even a whole song about him called "The Pinocchio." After Caitie and Tobee sing and dance to the song, Fifi can't help but tell one last joke. And guess what? It quacks Tobee up!

programme.title: 10 Little Dinosaurs - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: 10 Stegosauruses! 10 Triceratopses! 10 Pterodactyls! 10 Brontosauruses! And 10 Tyrannosaurus Rex! Wow! This Super Simple counting song introduces the numbers 1-10 and also some very cool dinosaur names! Can you say them all?!

programme.title: Little Billy's Skateboard - Carl's Car Wash and more
programme.desc: The Bubblegum Bandit pulls another bubblegum burglary and is about to escape when Officer Oona bursts his bubble! Moments later, little Billy skates right into the action and his skateboard becomes a gummy mess! Billy hurries to Carl’s Car Wash, but Carl won't clean his skateboard - it's a CAR wash, not a SKATEBOARD wash! Billy does some quick thinking...and his skateboard might just go through the car wash after all!

programme.title: Driving In My Car - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Drive a car, ride a bike, row a boat, ride on a train, and fly an airplane with this playful and super fun song for kids; “Driving In My Car”! Driving in my car. Vroom vroom vroom. Driving very fast. Vroom vroom vroom. Driving very slow. Vroom vroom vroom. I like driving. Driving in my car.

programme.title: 10 Little Dinosaurs - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: 10 Stegosauruses! 10 Triceratopses! 10 Pterodactyls! 10 Brontosauruses! And 10 Tyrannosaurus Rex! Wow! This Super Simple counting song introduces the numbers 1-10 and also some very cool dinosaur names! Can you say them all?!

programme.title: Flying Dragon Fruit Cake - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Come forth brave warriors and watch the Bumble Nums catch some Flying Dragon Fruits for their fiery Flying Dragon Fruit Cake! But be careful! They breathe fire and are very fast!

programme.title: Steve's Street Sweeper - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Steve the Street Sweeper is cleaning the street when garbage splatters all over the side of his truck! He doesn't want a dirty truck, so Steve races to Carl’s Car Wash! With a quick mess assessment and a few twists of some knobs, Carl’s suds-sational car wash is ready to give Steve's vehicle a good scrub-a-dub! Steve leaves one happy customer, and is ready to get back to sweeping rubbish.

programme.title: Carl's Big Adventure - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Carl is visited by three large, very dirty construction vehicles. But Carl’s Car Wash is not big enough to fit them! Carl has an idea! He can supersize his car wash so the vehicles can get a proper scrub-a-dub-dub. He just needs a few parts. With the help of old friends, Carl sets out on a big adventure to the darkest depths of the ocean, the highest heights in the land, and beyond! Don't miss Carl in his first mini-movie as he pushes himself to the limit in the name of vehicular cleanliness!

programme.title: Where Is Baby? - Super Simple and more

programme.title: Finny's First Day Of School - Super Simple and more

Surely Myrtle will come out of her shell when their teacher, a whale named Mr. Magellan, has them draw and present their favorite things to the class! Nope. Myrtle is even more nervous than ever! Being a good friend, Finny helps Myrtle through her anxiety, and the tiny turtle finally shows her drawing to everyone.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As little ones become increasingly mobile, their fascination with all things that move intensifies too. On the Go: Riding, Sailing and Soaring exposes babies to the different ways people travel -- on land, by sea, and in the air -- while it presents them with captivating real-world images, funny puppet shows, and beautiful classical music by Beethoven, Haydn, Mozart and Rossini.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: At 12 months, babies can identify specific sounds, and they re also starting to match the sounds they hear with the objects that make them. Meet the Orchestra -- First Instruments presents your little "maestro" with a playful introduction to the sights and sounds of a real orchestra -- from the clashing of cymbals to the purring of the cello and everything in between!

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Set off on a fun-filled "field trip" with your baby to discover animals found at the park, on the farm, and in your own backyard.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Discover instruments through narration and repetition. Real-life images and sounds will engage viewers as they dance to upbeat classical favorites from Beethoven, Mozart and more. Join your favorite Baby Einstein characters to discover what makes each instrument unique!

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Discover the exciting world of shapes and colors! Learn about the primary colors red, yellow, and blue with real-life imagery of animals and objects. Explore colors like purple, orange, and green and see artwork by Van Gogh! Discover the circles, squares, and triangles that surround us in everyday life, and introduce baby to the world of visual arts as children and artists create their own work!

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Learn about the numbers 1,2,3,4 & 5 through rhyme, real-life footage, counting, stories, and repetition - accompanied by classical music and real world imagery.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: World Music introduces you and your little one to beautiful sounds from every continent, bringing a fresh, new experience of music and culture. Sing, dance and play to exotic rhythms that open the door to an appreciation of different cultures from around the world.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Dive in with your little explorer across the seas to meet amazing animals living in the ocean, coral reef, and polar regions. Overflowing with underwater footage of whales, dolphins, tropical fish, and more, Neptune's Oceans invites you and your baby on an oceanic voyage of discovery!

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Babies love animals, and now you can bring animals from the seven continents home to your baby. Meet dozens of exotic animals including Asian pandas, Australian kangaroos and Arctic snow monkeys...all filmed in their beautiful, natural habitats. Rhythms and songs inspired by faraway lands have been orchestrated especially for little ears and encourage your baby to sing, dance and play to the world beats. You'll laugh together at the funny puppet shows featuring moms and their baby animals.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Baby Lullaby takes your baby on a soothing journey with classical lullabies by Bach, Brahms and Mozart. Enjoy relaxing ocean waves, sweet puppet shows and tranquil images. From fun time to rest time, Baby Lullaby is the perfect way to spend special time with your baby.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As babies grow and change, so does the landscape around them. From fiery red leaves to falling snowflakes; from flowers in bloom to fireworks in July, every season of the year has its own special magic just waiting to be discovered.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Ocean Explorers
programme.desc: Cal, Neptune, Opus, Dean, Tinker and others learn about the flora and fauna of the ocean through STEAM-based principles and real-life footage.

programme.title: Cal's Sound Yard
programme.desc: Cal's Sound Yard is a new animated series from Baby Einstein that introduces the letters of the alphabet and the sounds they make. Why all the tracing and repetition? And why are the letters out of order? Don't worry! There's a reason for all that; the content is based on "The Einstein Way" - a curiosity-driven learning philosophy, from industry experts, inspired by Montessori and STEAM.

programme.title: Learn Street Vehicles for Children - Kids Channel
programme.desc: A cool collection of education videos for preschool kids & babies where they learn the names of color car cartoons like super trucks, helicopters, garbage trucks, ambulance, digger, loader, fire engine, tractor, bus, police car, bulldozer and more. programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic and the Freedom Fighters journey to Robotnik's lab in hopes of deciphering his roboti-sizer system. While underground, Sonic spots his now roboti-sized Uncle Chuck aboard a Badlands bound mine-train and devises a plan for his rescue.

programme.title: Sonic Underground

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby

programme.desc: In Rainbow Village, people are busy preparing for a dance marathon, a competition in which all of the villagers participate. They were playing hide and seek but Felicia is such a good hider that she's refused to come out even though she's won the game.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Kiki wants to become a movie actress but the villagers have no idea how to direct a movie. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to turn into a movie director. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to transform into a babysitter and starts babysitting the children.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby

But the music box is broken. // Rainbow Ruby and Choco discover cars moving in every direction. Ling Ling asks Rainbow Ruby for help and she uses her magic suitcase to become a police officer.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ellie's and Jessy's hair are a complete mess after Felicia accidentally causes some Rainbow fruit to fall on them. programme.title: Curious Traveler

programme.title: Curious Traveler
programme.desc: How did Manchester kick-start Railway Mania in the Industrial Age? What is Manchesters Water Palace? What is so curious about the architecture of the John Rylands and Chethams Libraries? Why is a bee the symbol of Manchester? Which pub owner shooed her patrons out with a broom? Why is the National Football Museum in Manchester?

programme.title: Curious Traveler
programme.desc: How did Hong Kong get its name? What is so junk-y about a junk boat? Get curious about the Big Buddha, the Po Lin Monastery, and the Wisdom Path on Lantau Island. Then, the Kung Wo Tofu Factory, to learn the centuries-old tofu-making technique. We also take you inside a Tin Hau Temple, the Man Mo Temple, and a traditional Qipao dress-making shop.

programme.title: Curious Traveler
programme.desc: We get curious about the stunning natural landscape of Wales. We visit Brecon Beacons National Park, Pembrokeshire National Park, St. Davids (the smallest city in Britain), Hay-onWye (WalesTown of Books), the Victorian seaside resort town of Tenby, and lots and lots of curious castles.

programme.title: America's Socialist Experiment
programme.desc: A revealing look at 40 years of socialism in one of Americas conservative cities, Milwaukee, Wisconsin. Between 1910 and 1960, elected socialists including a U.S. Congressman and three mayors reduced corruption, improved conditions for working people, and cleaned up the environment, leaving a mixed legacy to which both Democrats and Republicans lay claim today.

programme.title: D-Day: Over Normandy
programme.desc: This innovative WWII documentary uses drone footage over key D-Day locations in France, along with newly created maps and photo animations, to visualize the D-Day landings in a new way. The modern-day aerial footage is accompanied by interviews with World War II veterans who bravely fought in those locations. Narrated by legendary American football coach Bill Belichik.

programme.title: D-Day: Over Normandy
programme.desc: This innovative WWII documentary uses drone footage over key D-Day locations in France, along with newly created maps and photo animations, to visualize the D-Day landings in a new way. The modern-day aerial footage is accompanied by interviews with World War II veterans who bravely fought in those locations. Narrated by legendary American football coach Bill Belichik.

programme.title: The U-Boat and the Rocket
programme.desc: During World War II, the Germans had two deadly weapons in their arsenal the U-Boat and the V-2 rocket. The new documentary film THE U-BOAT AND THE ROCKET chronicles the wartime development of the V-2, which was the worlds first long-range guided ballistic missile, and Germanys attempts to deploy the weapon from its formidable U-Boats. Woven into this history is the tale of two German brothers who were each involved with the secretive mission for the Third Reich. Ernst Steinhoff was Wernher von Brauns assistant for guidance control on the V-2, and Friedrich Steinhoff was a U-boat captain-lieutenant. Rich with archival footage and interviews with historical experts, THE U-BOAT AND THE ROCKET recounts Germany's creation and testing of the rocket, and the story of the two brothers who ultimately met different fates at the end of the war. Ernst and Wernher von Braun were invited to come to the U.S. in Operation Paperclip, the secret United States intelligence program which employed German scientists after Germany surrendered. Both Ernst and von Braun were subsequently inaugurated in the International Space Hall of Fame as pioneers of the Space Age. For Friedrich, the outcome was very different. After surrendering his U-Boat, he was brutally interrogated by US naval agents and allegedly committed suicide in a New England prison.

programme.title: 1st to Fight: Pacific War Marines
programme.desc: 1ST TO FIGHT: PACIFIC WAR MARINES tells the story of the brave men of the famed 1st Marine Division the oldest, largest and most decorated division of the U.S. Marine Corps. Narrated by actorJon Seda (HBO's The Pacific and NBC's Chicago P.D.), the film recounts the role of the 1st Marine Division in the United States' first major offensive in the Pacific theater during World War II. In 1942, on the Pacific island of Guadalcanal, Americans faced and defeated the Japanese for the first time in a land battle. The fight was one of the most brutal of the war. The Division went on to fight bloody battles in Cape Gloucester and Peleliu, but their decisive victory at Guadalcanal was one of the turning points of World War II for the Allied powers.
